diagrams.title: RIP Network Topology Example
diagrams.description: Shows a sample network with 4 routers demonstrating how RIP learns routes
elements: Hop count labels at each segment
diagrams.purpose: Understand how RIP propagates routing information and calculates hop counts

diagrams.title: RIP Timer Flowchart
diagrams.description: Timeline showing the three RIP timers and their relationship
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how RIP timers work together for route management and convergence

diagrams.title: Count-to-Infinity Problem
diagrams.description: Two routers A and B with route looping between them
diagrams.purpose: Understand the routing loop problem and why 16 = infinity

diagrams.title: Split Horizon Example
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how split horizon prevents advertising routes back
elements: Interface on A receiving route from B should NOT send that route back to B
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how split horizon prevents routing loops
